Row.Text: A Watermill Upgrade is an upgrade to the default Watermill, adding more [ICON_PRODUCTION] production and [ICON_FOOD] food to your city. A Watermill must be in the city before the Watermill Upgrade.
A Watermill Upgrade is an upgrade to the default Watermill, adding more [ICON_PRODUCTION] production and [ICON_FOOD] food to your city. A Watermill must be in the city before the Watermill Upgrade.
A Watermill Upgrade is an upgrade to the default Watermill, adding more [ICON_PRODUCTION] production and [ICON_FOOD] food to your city. A Watermill must be in the city before the Watermill Upgrade.
